title: gh-141805: Fix crash after concurrent addition objects with the same hash to set
author: serhiy-storchaka
body:
This happens when the set contained several elements with the same hash, and then some of them were removed.


<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-139071 -->
* Issue: gh-139071
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->
<!-- gh-issue-number: gh-141805 -->
* Issue: gh-141805
<!-- /gh-issue-number -->

comments.author: skirpichev
comments.body: I think this also fixes #143546.  (N.B.: on my system I can't trigger a crash with ``left &= right`` from issue, but ``left |= right`` - "works" for me.)

comments.author: miss-islington-app[bot]
comments.body:
Sorry, @serhiy-storchaka, I could not cleanly backport this to `3.13` due to a conflict.
Please backport using [cherry_picker](https://pypi.org/project/cherry-picker/) on command line.
```
cherry_picker b8e925b4f8f6c5e28fbebc4f3965bf77610698b3 3.13
```
